questions.question: Which statement is correct regarding the content on Slide 28?
options: Respite care can be provided for the primary caregivers.
This is not standard pediatric practice.
This applies only to adult patients.
This is contradicted by current evidence.
questions.rationale: The correct answer is supported directly by the lecture material presented on Slide 28. Respite care can be provided for the primary caregivers.... This concept is fundamental to pediatric nursing care. The distractors are incorrect because they either apply adult principles to pediatric patients, misrepresent the content, or contradict what was taught in this chapter. Understanding this distinction ensures safe clinical practice and accurate NCLEX/ATI performance.
